{0x0100,0x0000}{0x1900,0x0001}[0x000A]{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0109,0x0001}{0xBD01}{0x1900,0x0002}{0xBE00}[0x000A]{0x0200,0x0002}개 손에 넣었다!
{0x0100,0x0000}{0x1900,0x0001}[0x000A]{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0109,0x0001}{0xBD01}{0x1900,0x0002} 손에 넣었다!

{0x0100,0x0000}{0x1900,0x0001} {0x0109,0x0001}[0x000A]“{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0107,0x0002}{0xBD01}”{0x1900,0x0002} 손에 넣었다!
{0x0100,0x0000}{0x1900,0x0001}[0x000A]{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0109,0x0001}{0xBD01}{0x1900,0x0002} 발견했다!
{0x0100,0x0000}{0x1900,0x0001}[0x000A]{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0109,0x0001}{0xBD01}{0x1900,0x0002} 발견했다!
{0x0100,0x0000}{0x1900,0x0001} {0x0109,0x0001}[0x000A]“{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0107,0x0002}{0xBD01}”{0x1900,0x0002} 발견했다!
아쉽다! {0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0109,0x0000}{0xBD01}{0x1900,0x0001}[0x000A]가득 차서 더 이상 지닐 수 없다!
{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0109,0x0000}{0xBD01}{0x1900,0x0002} 손에 넣었다!{0xBE01}[0x000A]아쉽다![0x000A]가방이 가득 차 있다...
{0x0100,0x0000}{0x1900,0x0001} {0x0109,0x0001}{0x1900,0x0002}[0x000A]{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0112,0x0002} 포켓{0xBD01}에 넣었다
{0xBDFF:0x000B}
{0xBDFF:0x000C}
{0x0100,0x0000}{0x1900,0x0001}[0x000A]{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0127,0x0001}{0xBD01}{0x1900,0x0002}{0xBE00}[0x000A]받았다!
{0x0100,0x0000}{0x1900,0x0001} {0x0101,0x0002}에게[0x000A]{0x0127,0x0001}{0x1900,0x0002}{0xBE00}[0x000A]달아주었다!
{0x0100,0x0000}{0x1900,0x0001}[0x000A]{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0109,0x0001}{0xBD01}{0x1900,0x0002} 손에 넣었다!
포켓몬은 나오지 않는 것 같다...
{0x0100,0x0000}{0x1900,0x0001}[0x000A]{0xBD00,0x0006,0x0000,0x0000}{0x0109,0x0001}{0xBD01}{0x1900,0x0002} 손에 넣었다!
